message:
Implement E2E daemon lifecycle tests (caam-czda)

- Added `internal/e2e/workflows/daemon_helper_test.go`:
    - Helper for running daemon in subprocess with mocked refresh logic.
- Added `internal/e2e/workflows/daemon_lifecycle_test.go`:
    - Tests start/stop, PID file management.
- Added `internal/e2e/workflows/daemon_signals_test.go`:
    - Tests SIGHUP reload and SIGTERM shutdown.
- Added `internal/e2e/workflows/daemon_refresh_test.go`:
    - Tests proactive token refresh logic with mocked provider.
- Refactored `internal/refresh` package to allow mocking API calls.
- Implemented SIGHUP handling in `internal/daemon/daemon.go`.
